planets.name: Don
planets.summary: Archive cluster around don: 859 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2025-11-21
artifacts.excerpt: my dentist is a dad of college kids that seems to operate on guilting and shaming people. he said "i tell people like you to do xyz and you don't listen" in this shaming tone. there was this catch-pause after like he was waiting for me to get dysregulated and scared, but in my head this year there was a calm "why the hell is he talking to me like i'm 12" and i just neutrally looked at him. he straight up changed how he was speaking to me after YEARS. don't return energy that's not respectful with any of your energy and just watch people change wordlessly
